message:
fix: prevent closed-store panics and consolidate test suites (bd-1rh)

- Add ErrStoreClosed guard to DoltStore query methods (execContext,
  queryContext, queryRowContext) to prevent nil-pointer panics when
  accessing a closed store
- Add IsClosed() method to DoltStore for callers to check store state
- Guard maybeAutoBackup, maybeAutoPush, and maybeAutoCommit against
  closed stores in PersistentPostRun
- Consolidate metadata_filter_test.go from 9 separate stores to 1
  shared suite (TestMetadataFilterSuite)
- Consolidate metadata_ready_test.go from 4 separate stores to 1
  shared suite (TestGetReadyWork_MetadataSuite)
- Consolidate thread_test.go from 5 separate stores to 1 shared suite
  (TestThreadTraversalSuite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
